title: Hiring Software Engineer at PharmEasy Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Hiring Software Engineer at PharmEasy Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Join the PharmEasy Ventures Solutions family as a Software Engineer in Allahabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About PharmEasy Ventures Solutions:
PharmEasy Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PharmEasy Ventures Solutions!
